title: User logs in and reaches the dashboard
description: An authenticated user can sign in successfully and land on the main dashboard with the expected summary content visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify KPI summary content is visible

title: Admin creates a report from the reports list
description: An authenticated admin can start from the reports list, open the create flow, save a new report, and see it appear in report details.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the reports section
Open the report creation flow
Fill in the required report fields with valid values
Submit the report form
Verify the report detail view is displayed
Verify the newly created report is visible in the detail view

title: Access dashboard after login
description: An admin can log in and land on the main dashboard with key KPIs and map content visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}

Submit the login form
Verify dashboard KPI information is displayed
Verify the dashboard map is displayed

title: Import a dataset with preview confirmation

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the datasets page
Upload a valid Excel file for import
Review the import preview
Confirm the import
Verify the imported dataset appears in the list

title: Create a user
description: An admin can create a user from the users page and see the user appear in the list afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the users page
Click the control to create a user
Fill in the user name with a unique value
Fill in the user email with a unique value
Assign a role to the user
Save the user
Verify the new user appears in the list
